title: calophyllum brasiliense var. antillanum
intro: Calophyllum brasiliense var. antillanum, also known as the Antillean Calophyllum, is a variety of the Calophyllum brasiliense tree native to the Caribbean islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Calophyllum brasiliense var. antillanum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its potential to protect against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Calophyllum brasiliense var. antillanum include extracts and oils, which can be used topically or internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
